title: Has anyone had any experience with COC protocol/ care oncology?
body:
Spoke with a rep today and it sounds promising but of course there's so little information on it online. 

For some background - it's a treatment regimen used in the UK where patients take metformin (diabetes medication), atorvastatin (cholesterol medication), doxycycline (antibiotic), and mebendazole (antiparasite) alongside their current treatment.
